meaning: adj.如天堂的,神圣的,天空的,极优美的,天上的
examples: It was so new and big and wonderful and such a heavenly color.
There are other heavenly bodies out there besides the moon and stars.
Sichuan has always enjoyed the reputation of being a "Heavenly Land of Plenty".
We regained the light and pushed on to La Bugue and our heavenly omelets and wine.
Those bivalves were now swimming in a heavenly sea of cream, bacon and calvados.
